Templates for bug reports, feature requests, and RFCs with specific fields and sections.


## Files
- **[bug.yml](bug.yml.md)**: Template for filing bug reports with required fields and labels for issue tracking.
- **[feature.yml](feature.yml.md)**: Template for submitting feature requests with required fields and optional context.
- **[rfc.yml](rfc.yml.md)**: Template for filing a Request for Comments (RFC) with sections for problem, proposed change, and additional context.
